services.name: Alertmanager
services.description: Severity-based alert routing, grouping, and silencing service for the monitoring stack.

services.name: Platform API Gateway
services.description: Unified authenticated gateway for operator and automation access to platform HTTP APIs.

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: Use cached JWKS for bearer-token validation until the cache expires. After cache expiry, return GATE_CIRCUIT_OPEN with Retry-After 30 for auth-gated requests.
Buffer platform.api.request events in the gateway-local outbox under /data/nats-outbox.jsonl and flush them when NATS publication succeeds again.

production.notes: Repository automation is ready; live publication still requires apply from main.

services.name: Proxmox Backup Server
services.description: Backup datastore and snapshot retention service for the Proxmox estate.

services.name: Browser Runner
services.description: Private Playwright session runtime for governed web action, extraction, screenshots, and PDF capture.

production.notes: The runtime stays private-only and is exposed to operators through the governed API gateway route plus the Dify tool bridge.

services.name: Changedetection.io
services.description: Private upstream content, dependency feed, and provider API change monitoring service with repo-governed watch catalogue reconciliation.

production.notes: The runtime stays private to docker-runtime-lv3; authenticated operator and automation access is brokered through the shared API gateway route at https://api.lv3.org/v1/changedetection.

services.name: Crawl4AI
services.description: Private LLM-optimised web content crawler for cleaned Markdown extraction and bounded browser-assisted fetches.

production.notes: The runtime stays private to docker-runtime-lv3 and the guest network; there is no public DNS record and no shared API gateway route for Crawl4AI.

services.name: Deployment History Portal
services.description: Generated portal for browsing live applies, promotions, and mutation audit history.

services.name: Coolify
services.description: Repo-managed PaaS control plane for deploying public applications directly from Git repositories.

services.name: Coolify Apps Ingress
services.description: Shared public ingress surface for Coolify-managed applications published from the coolify-lv3 runtime.

production.notes: Shared entrypoint for repo-managed Coolify applications, with wildcard alias coverage handled by the edge topology.

services.name: Dify
services.description: Visual LLM workflow and agent canvas with governed LV3 tool sync and trace export support.

production.notes: Branch-local rollout uses a Dify-local Qdrant sidecar until ADR 0198 lands on main.

services.name: Directus
services.description: REST and GraphQL operational data API over the dedicated Directus PostgreSQL database.
services.notes: Directus runs on docker-runtime-lv3, uses a dedicated PostgreSQL database named directus, publishes data.lv3.org through the shared NGINX edge, delegates routine browser sign-in to Keycloak, and retains a repo-managed break-glass local admin password for recovery.

production.notes: Repo automation verifies the public /server/health endpoint, the Keycloak login redirect, and scoped REST plus GraphQL token access against the governed service_registry collection.

services.name: Docker Build VM
services.description: Private build worker for image builds, heavy validation, and repository offload tasks.

services.name: Docker Runtime VM
services.description: Primary runtime for containerised control-plane and platform services.

services.name: Developer Portal
services.description: Generated public documentation site for services, ADRs, runbooks, release notes, and platform reference data.

services.name: Dozzle
services.description: Repo-managed real-time container log hub across the Docker guests.

services.name: Excalidraw
services.description: Private collaborative whiteboard and architecture diagram surface backed by repo-generated `.excalidraw` scenes.

production.notes: Live applied on the ADR 0202 workstream branch and protected by the shared Keycloak-backed oauth2-proxy edge flow.

services.name: Gitea
services.description: Private self-hosted Git service with Keycloak SSO, repo bootstrap automation, and a dedicated Actions runner on docker-build-lv3.

services.name: Gotenberg
services.description: Private stateless document rendering service for HTML, Markdown, text, and Office-to-PDF conversion workflows.

production.notes: The runtime stays private to the guest network; authenticated operator and automation access may be brokered through the shared API gateway route at https://api.lv3.org/v1/gotenberg.

services.name: Grafana
services.description: Metrics dashboards, platform overview, and service detail dashboards.

staging.notes: Planned shared-edge staging hostname; live publication remains pending.

services.name: Harbor
services.description: Private container registry with vulnerability scanning, operator SSO, and scoped robot credentials for repository automation.

production.notes: Published through the shared NGINX edge while Harbor handles operator authentication and project policy.

services.name: Headscale
services.description: Repo-managed control plane for the LV3 zero-trust mesh VPN.

services.name: Flagsmith
services.description: Feature flag and remote configuration control plane with repo-managed environment and baseline feature seeding.
services.notes: The public UI and browser management API are protected by the shared edge oauth2-proxy and Keycloak flow while server-side environment keys remain private and repo-managed through OpenBao.

production.notes: The bootstrap org, project, environments, feature definitions, and environment API keys are seeded from the repo-managed Flagsmith runtime role.

services.name: Homepage
services.description: Unified operator-facing dashboard for the current LV3 service inventory, quick links, and live service reachability.

production.notes: Published through the shared NGINX edge and gated behind the repo-managed Keycloak oauth2-proxy flow.

services.name: Keycloak
services.description: Shared SSO and OIDC broker for operator-facing and approved agent-facing applications.

staging.notes: Planned staging identity hostname on the shared edge.

services.name: Langfuse
services.description: Self-hosted LLM trace, generation, and evaluation observability surface for repo-managed agents.

services.name: Mail Platform
services.description: Managed SMTP, IMAP, and delivery automation surface for platform notifications.

services.name: Mailpit
services.description: Private SMTP interception surface for staging, development, and assertion-level email verification.

production.notes: Mailpit runs privately on docker-runtime-lv3 for non-production SMTP interception and operator inspection; production services must continue to relay through Stalwart.

services.name: MinIO
services.description: Shared S3-compatible object storage runtime for platform buckets, governed bucket policy reconciliation, and browser-based object inspection.

production.notes: The public S3 API remains machine-accessible while the browser console is separately published at minio-console.lv3.org behind the shared edge OIDC gate.

services.name: Redpanda
services.description: Private Kafka-compatible streaming platform for durable, replayable event logs and schema-managed topics.
services.notes: The private Kafka listener stays on 9092 while the authenticated Admin API, HTTP Proxy, and Schema Registry listeners use 9644, 8103, and 8104 because docker-runtime-lv3 already reserves 8097 for JupyterHub and 8099 for the Temporal UI.

production.notes: Platform callers use the Kafka listener on 9092 while the authenticated Admin API, HTTP Proxy, and Schema Registry listeners remain private on 9644, 8103, and 8104.

services.name: Matrix Synapse
services.description: Repo-managed Matrix Synapse runtime with Discord and WhatsApp mautrix bridges that serves as the canonical ServerClaw conversation hub.

production.notes: The public Matrix client API is edge-published while authentication stays inside Synapse, federation remains disabled for ADR 0255, and ADR 0256 manages Discord plus WhatsApp bridge bots through application-service registrations and bridge-management-room smoke verification.

services.name: Mattermost
services.description: Private operator and agent collaboration surface for ChatOps workflows.

services.name: n8n
services.description: Repo-managed external app connector fabric and webhook automation runtime for ServerClaw, with a public edge hostname and PostgreSQL-backed persistence.

production.notes: The editor is protected by the shared oauth2-proxy and Keycloak edge flow while selected webhook paths remain intentionally public for governed ServerClaw connector calls.

services.name: NATS JetStream
services.description: Private internal event bus for platform control-plane, secret-rotation, and RAG lifecycle events.
services.notes: The monitoring endpoint stays loopback-only on docker-runtime-lv3 at http://127.0.0.1:8222/healthz.

services.name: NetBox
services.description: Private topology, IPAM, and inventory system for the platform.

services.name: Nextcloud
services.description: Repo-managed personal data plane for durable files, attachments, and DAV-backed calendars, contacts, and tasks.

production.notes: Published through the shared NGINX edge while Nextcloud itself enforces session, login, and DAV discovery behavior.

services.name: Typesense
services.description: Private full-text search engine for structured internal platform data and faceted operator lookups.

production.notes: Private Tailscale controller route published by the Proxmox host proxy.

services.name: NGINX Edge
services.description: Public ingress edge that terminates TLS and publishes selected services.

services.name: Nomad
services.description: Private distributed scheduler for durable batch jobs and long-running internal workloads.

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: Runtime-targeted jobs cannot place while the docker-runtime Nomad client is unavailable. The Nomad server and build-targeted jobs continue to operate.
degradation_modes.recovery_signal: docker-runtime-lv3 rejoins the Nomad client set

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: Build-targeted or long-running helper jobs pinned to the build pool cannot place while the docker-build Nomad client is unavailable. The Nomad server and runtime-targeted jobs continue to operate.
degradation_modes.recovery_signal: docker-build-lv3 rejoins the Nomad client set

services.name: ntfy
services.description: Private push notification gateway used for critical platform paging.

services.name: ntopng
services.description: Private flow-visibility and traffic-inspection surface for the platform network.

services.name: Ollama
services.description: Private local LLM inference runtime for platform agents and operator workbenches.

services.name: Piper
services.description: Private CPU neural text-to-speech runtime for agent voice output, narrated notifications, and LiveKit-bound spoken responses.

production.notes: Piper remains private to docker-runtime-lv3 and the managed guest network; there is no public hostname or shared API gateway route.

services.name: Open WebUI
services.description: Private operator and agent workbench for governed platform interactions.

services.name: OpenBao
services.description: Private secrets authority for controller automation and runtime credentials.

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: OpenBao cannot persist state without PostgreSQL. Secret reads and writes fail until the storage backend reconnects.

services.name: OpenFGA
services.description: Private delegated authorization graph for ServerClaw workspace, assistant, skill, connector, and data-scope capability checks.

production.notes: The guest-reachable runtime stays on docker-runtime-lv3 for SLO probes and k6 smoke/load validation. Controller-local bootstrap and bearer-key verification continue to use the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy at http://100.64.0.1:8014.

services.name: Temporal
services.description: Private durable workflow and task queue engine for long-running platform automation that must survive worker crashes and retries.
services.notes: The frontend gRPC port, HTTP port, and UI are intentionally loopback-only on docker-runtime-lv3; operators reach them through SSH tunneling or repo-managed admin-tools commands.

production.notes: The repo-managed `lv3` namespace is bootstrapped automatically, while UI diagnostics are exposed only through a loopback tunnel to preserve the current guest firewall boundary.

services.name: Platform Operations Portal
services.description: Interactive operator portal with live service actions, drift visibility, runbook launchers, and deployment streaming.

production.notes: Interactive runtime now ships from the repo, but live cutover from the static portal still requires apply from main.

staging.notes: Planned staging portal for the interactive runtime.

services.name: Outline
services.description: Self-hosted living knowledge wiki that publishes repo-managed ADR, runbook, and architecture indexes through Outline.
services.notes: Live-apply evidence is tracked on the workstream branch; merge-to-main still must update the integrated README, VERSION, changelog, and versions/stack.yaml surfaces.

services.name: JupyterHub
services.description: Shared interactive notebook environment for exploratory platform analysis, prototype workflows, and governed operator experimentation.
services.notes: The current repo-managed notebook contract exposes Ollama, the private platform-context API, and the service-local jupyterhub-shared MinIO bucket inside spawned single-user servers; shared global MinIO, raw Qdrant, and LiteLLM remain future work.

services.name: Paperless-ngx
services.description: Self-hosted document archive and metadata API with OCR, taxonomy reconciliation, and Keycloak-backed operator sign-in.
services.notes: Live-apply evidence is tracked on the workstream branch; merge-to-main still must update the integrated README, VERSION, changelog, and versions/stack.yaml surfaces once the final mainline apply is complete.

production.notes: docs.lv3.org remains reserved for the developer portal, so Paperless publishes at paperless.lv3.org.

services.name: Plane
services.description: Repo-managed Plane workspace for platform kanban tracking and ADR synchronization.

services.name: Platform Context API
services.description: Private retrieval-augmented query API for repository and platform context.

services.name: Plausible Analytics
services.description: Privacy-first cookie-free web analytics dashboard and tracker for selected public LV3 pages.
services.notes: The dashboard uses the shared edge OIDC boundary while the tracker, event ingestion path, and health endpoints remain intentionally public for instrumentation and probe traffic.

production.notes: Plausible Community Edition does not expose service-native OIDC in the verified upstream path, so browser access is gated at the shared edge and repo-managed site tracking is injected only on the declared public hostnames.

services.name: Portainer
services.description: Private read-mostly Docker runtime operations UI and API.

services.name: PostgreSQL
services.description: Managed high-availability PostgreSQL service for control-plane and future application state.

redundancy.standby_location: postgres-replica-lv3 on the same Proxmox host
redundancy.failover_trigger: Patroni health loss on postgres-lv3 or operator-initiated switchover.
redundancy.failback_method: Reinitialize the former primary as a Patroni standby before a planned switchover back.

standby.failure_domain_honesty: This warm standby protects against guest-level corruption and software faults, but it does not cover loss of the single Proxmox host.

services.name: Proxmox UI
services.description: Private Proxmox management interface for host and guest administration.

services.name: Netdata Realtime Metrics
services.description: Authenticated Netdata parent dashboard for live host and guest metrics streamed into monitoring-lv3.

services.name: SearXNG
services.description: Private metasearch runtime for operator and agent web lookups with a tailnet-only hostname.

production.notes: Tailnet-only hostname published on the Proxmox host Tailscale IP.

services.name: Woodpecker CI
services.description: Repo-managed event-driven CI server with Gitea OAuth, a public edge URL, and a private controller path on the Proxmox host.

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: Woodpecker cannot persist repositories, secrets, pipeline history, or queued state without PostgreSQL.

services.name: Semaphore
services.description: Private Semaphore UI and API for bounded Ansible job execution.

services.name: ServerClaw
services.description: Public chat-first ServerClaw assistant surface backed by repo-governed local model and search integrations.

production.notes: ServerClaw uses in-app Keycloak OIDC for routine browser login while retaining a repo-managed bootstrap admin as break-glass access.

services.name: Public Status Page
services.description: Public-facing platform status page backed by Uptime Kuma and independently checked by Uptime Robot.

services.name: step-ca
services.description: Private certificate authority for internal TLS and SSH certificates.

services.name: Apache Tika
services.description: Private stateless document text and metadata extraction service for the RAG and ServerClaw memory ingestion pipelines.

production.notes: The runtime stays private to the guest network and is consumed directly by repo-managed ingestion workflows; no shared API gateway publication is issued.

services.name: Tesseract OCR
services.description: Private OCR fallback API for scanned PDFs and image uploads when Apache Tika returns no embedded text.

production.notes: Tesseract OCR stays private on docker-runtime-lv3 and is intended as the second-stage fallback when Tika returns no text for image-like documents or scanned PDFs.

services.name: Uptime Kuma
services.description: Synthetic monitoring surface used to track public and internal service reachability.

staging.notes: Planned staged monitor surface on the shared edge.

services.name: Vaultwarden
services.description: Private Bitwarden-compatible credential vault for operator-managed passwords, recovery codes, and TOTP material.

services.name: Windmill
services.description: Operator and agent workflow runtime exposed privately on the management tailnet.

degradation_modes.degraded_behaviour: Windmill cannot accept or persist workflow state without PostgreSQL. Requests fail until database connectivity returns.
